name: AfdxOutputPacketWithSignals
title: AfdxOutputPacketWithSignals
description: Sends a message and automatically updates the payload with the current Tx-signal values of the SignalServer.
Note: There are conceptually two distinct ways to apply send specific signal values:
Note: During PreStart-phase the SignalServer is not yet initialized

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of the message to send that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.
